bio: Mohammad Ali Jafari served as Commander-in-Chief of the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) from 2007 to 2019. He reorganised the IRGC's command structure and expanded its internal security role, particularly the [Basij](/orgs/basij) militia. He oversaw IRGC operations during the Syrian civil war and the expansion of Iran's ballistic missile programme. He was replaced by [Hossein Salami](/people/hossein-salami) in April 2019.
